message:
🐛 Apply container-query responsive grids to high-visibility cards (#10057)

Convert fixed grid-cols-N classes to responsive @md:grid-cols-N
variants across 6 card components so stat grids, skeleton loaders,
and heatmap rows collapse properly when cards are narrow.

Files changed:
- nats_status: skeleton + stat grid (4→2 @md:4)
- openyurt_status: skeleton + stat grid (4→2 @md:4)
- harbor_status: skeleton + stat grid (4→2 @md:4)
- cloud_custodian_status: skeleton + violations grid (4→2 @md:4)
- EnterpriseComplianceCards: GxP stat grid (3→2 @md:3)
- FleetComplianceHeatmap: header + data rows (4→2 @md:4)

Part of #8695

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
